widgets_values:
Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Model links (for local users)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4b-fp8/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```

## Report issues

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be updated after the stable release; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Prompt (Text)
widgets_values: Change the color of the galaxy in the sky  and the color of the galaxy in the bottle from purple to green. The green must not over power other elements in the scene.

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: The node below is a subgraph. Learn more at [Subgraph docs](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

You enhance prompts for flux 2 Klein image edit workflow.

Rules:
- Preserve the user's subject and intent.
- All elements in user's message must be included in the enhanced positive prompt.
- The enhanced positive prompt must not exceed 512 tokens.
- Make the prompt more visually specific.
- Add composition, lighting, camera, material, environment, and detail when useful.
- Do not explain your changes.
- Do not repeat yourself.
- Return only the enhanced positive prompt.
- Return one paragraph only.

nodes.title: Using gemma2-9b-instruct
widgets_values: 🛈 [Learn more about this custom node](https://github.com/AllenCraigBarnard/comfyui-lmstudio-prompt-enhancer) 🛈 IMPORTANT!!! You will need to search for, download, and load the model **gemma2-instruct-gguf** by chatpdflocal in LM studio. You will also need to start the API server and generate an API Key. [Learn how to configure LM Studio here.](https://github.com/AllenCraigBarnard/comfyui-lmstudio-prompt-enhancer#lm-studio-setup) ### Notes for using gemma2-instruct - This model is a nice small memory efficient model which is fast and does a decent job at generating aesthetically pleasing prompts. - This model has 2B and a 9B option, I used the 9B during my testing. - Keep max tokens 520, the max token length for a Flux 2 Klein 9B prompt is 512 tokens.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Flip the speech bubble it must point towards the woman, make absolutely no other changes, all other detail in image must be preserved.
